meta.expr:content: data:blog.metaDescription ? data:blog.metaDescription : data:blog.title + " is your premier source for football scores, fixtures, transfer news, match analysis, and highlights."
meta.name: description

meta.expr:content: data:view.pageTitle + " - Read full football coverage, scores, and analysis on " + data:blog.title
meta.name: description

b:widget.title: Google Analytics 4 — Paste GA4 script here

p.b:if: Official hub for football scores, news & highlights

b:includable.div: ADVERTISEMENTHeader Leaderboard — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (728×90 / Responsive)

div.p: The page you're looking for might have been removed, had its name changed, or is temporarily unavailable.

div.div: ADVERTISEMENTTop In-Article Banner — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (336×280 / Responsive)
ADVERTISEMENTBottom In-Article Banner — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (300×250 / Native)

div.h3: Exclusive chat with the league MVP

b:includable.div: ADVERTISEMENTSidebar Medium Rectangle — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (300×250)
ADVERTISEMENTSidebar Half Page — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (300×600)

b:includable.p: Get weekly football recaps, analysis and exclusive stories straight to your inbox.

b:includable.div: ADVERTISEMENTFooter Leaderboard — Replace with your AdSense ins tag (728×90 / Responsive)

div.p: is your trusted source for fixtures, scores, news and in-depth football coverage.
